title: microchilus curviflorus
intro: Microchilus curviflorus is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, known for its unique curved flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used to treat various ailments. The roots of Microchilus curviflorus have been traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, with health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and used to make teas or infusions, and in some cases, are combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
